title: Feature / Requirement
description: Schema for a project feature, optionally upgraded to a full Requirement object with actor/action/value, acceptance criteria, NFRs, and traceability fields.

id.description: Stable identifier. Recommended convention: REQ-NNN (e.g. REQ-001) for spec-grade entries.

type.description: MVP classification: core (must-have for MVP) or optional (deferrable).

requirement_type.description: Spec-driven classification, distinct from core/optional. Optional: existing features without this field default to 'functional' at read time.

actor.description: Primary actor that triggers or benefits from this requirement (e.g. 'broker', 'carrier', 'system', 'admin'). User-story 'As a <actor>'.

action.description: Verb phrase describing what the actor does. User-story 'I want <action>'.

priority.description: MoSCoW priority. 'must' requirements must trace to >=1 chapter and >=1 acceptance criterion.

dependencies.description: Other Requirement IDs this one depends on. Enforced as a directed acyclic graph by the validation service.

acceptance_criteria.description: Testable Given/When/Then scenarios. Required for 'must'-priority requirements.

nfr.description: Non-functional requirement entries. Each must include a measurable threshold.

traces_to.description: Traceability links. Populated lazily as the pipeline progresses.

outline_section_id.description: ID/title of the outline section this requirement maps to.

chapter_ids.description: Indexes/identifiers of chapters that reference this requirement.

problem_id.description: Mirrors problem_mapped_to for graph queries; kept in sync by the requirements writer.

id.description: Stable AC ID. Recommended convention: AC-<reqid>-N (e.g. AC-001-1).

then.description: Expected outcome. Should be measurable (concrete value, threshold, or observable state).

measurable.description: Self-declared measurability flag. Validated semantically by the AC Testability Gate.

metric.description: What is measured (e.g. 'p95 latency', 'concurrent users', 'mean time to recovery').

threshold.description: Concrete target with units (e.g. '< 500ms', '>= 99.9%', 'SOC 2 Type II').

verification.description: How the threshold is verified (load test, audit, fuzzer, etc.).
